name: Widowmaker
description:
a character defined by her cool, collected demeanor and precise, calculated actions. Physically, she is tall and willowy, with a lean, athletic build that exudes both grace and strength. Her porcelain-smooth, very pale skin contrasts sharply with her dark, glossy hair that falls just past her shoulders. Her posture is upright and poised, with every movement deliberate and precise. Her striking, clear eyes give her an intense, almost uncanny focus, and her long limbs and narrow waist create an elegant silhouette, hinting at agility and endurance rather than bulk. Overall, she appears both statuesque and quietly powerful, as if every line of her body were sculpted for precision.
